title: Mechanical Piping Engineer (Shipyard / Autocad / Office)
description:
Responsibilities

  • Review of machinery and equipment specification, meeting technical specification. Interpretation of classification rules to address to review comment.
  • Familiar with equipment specification and their installation requirement such as main engines, generators, propulsion, gearbox, hydraulic operated equipment, HVAC, refrigeration and others.
  • Familiar with marine piping system such as bilge, ballast, tank gauging, cooling, fuel oil, sanitary , fire protection and others. Able to select pump types, compressor, pipe material, thickness, valves and pipe fittings that meet pressure rating and functionality. 
  • Liaise with designer and vendors to develop pipe schematic drawing, machineries space equipment layout and equipment installation plan.
  • Review of Mechanical interfacing for major equipment such as main engine, gear box and propeller shafting and others.
  • Working with a team of engineers to develop the detail 3D ship model for production. Job involving interfacing and clash check on routing of pipe systems, HVAC, electrical system installation and others.
  • Generate MTO for pipe routing, fittings and pipe spool for production.

Requirements

  • Bachelor degree in Marine engineering or diploma in marine engineering
  • At least 5 years relevant working experience in shipyard
  • Proficiency in AutoCAD
  • Understand shipbuilding and project processes.
  • Able to comprehend the technical specification and discuss projects with customers.
  • Analytical ability

How to Apply:

Interested applicants, kindly click on “APPLY NOW”

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website www.trustrecruit.com.sg.
